max_file_size_mb.title: Maximum File Size (MB)
max_file_size_mb.description: Maximum upload size for files in the media manager.

approved_extensions.title: Approved File Extensions
approved_extensions.default: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg, pdf, mp4, webm, mp3, wav, zip
approved_extensions.description: Comma-separated list of allowed extensions without dots. Use * to allow all file types.
